questions.text: What is the primary purpose of Inverted File (IVF) index configurations in vector databases?
options: To restrict the query search space by only scanning centroids closest to the query vector.
questions.correct_answer: To restrict the query search space by only scanning centroids closest to the query vector.
questions.explanation: IVF groups database vectors into Voronoi cells. At query time, the search is restricted to the closest centroids, avoiding exhaustive scans.
